title: eRNAHunter
author: Lu, Lu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: eRNAHunter is an ensemble-based machine-learning approach that integrates RNA transcription signals and DNA sequence features to discriminate true eRNA loci from non-eRNA loci.
steps_raw: eRNAHunter is an ensemble-based machine-learning approach that integrates RNA transcription signals and DNA sequence features to discriminate true eRNA loci from non-eRNA loci.
